member.name: T:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer
member.summary: The main Add-In server class that Inventor loads

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.Activate(Inventor.ApplicationAddInSite,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Called when the Add-In is loaded by Inventor

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.Deactivate
member.summary: Called when the Add-In is unloaded

member.name: P:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.Automation
member.summary: Returns automation object (not used)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.ExecuteCommand(System.Int32)
member.summary: Execute command (not used)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.CreateUserInterface
member.summary: Create ribbon buttons

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.CreateGlyphPicture(System.String,System.Int32,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Creates a simple colored square icon with a single letter. This avoids shipping separate icon files and prevents the ribbon from showing text-only controls.

member.name: T:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.PictureDispConverter
member.summary: Helper to convert System.Drawing.Image to stdole.IPictureDisp (required by Inventor API).

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.m_CloneButton_OnExecute(Inventor.NameValueMap)
member.summary: Clone Assembly button clicked

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.StandardAddInServer.m_PartRenamerButton_OnExecute(Inventor.NameValueMap)
member.summary: Handles the Part Renamer button click

member.name: T:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner
member.summary: Main assembly cloning logic - Uses EXACT methodology from VBScript Option 9

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.#ctor(Inventor.Application)
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.CloneAssembly
member.summary: Main entry point - clone the active assembly

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.UpdateCopiedSubAssemblyReferences(System.String)
member.summary: Update references inside copied sub-assemblies so nested links resolve to copied files.

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.GetDestinationFolder(System.String)
member.summary: Get destination folder from user using folder browser dialog
Collect all referenced parts from assembly (recursive) Also captures occurrence names for iLogic patching
Recursively collect parts from assembly

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.CopyAllSubAssemblies(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Copy all referenced sub-assemblies to destination folder (same filename)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.GetDescriptionFromIProperty(Inventor.Document)
member.summary: Get description from iProperty

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.CopyAllParts(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Copy all parts to destination folder using File.Copy (same as VBScript fso.CopyFile) Builds occurrence name mappings for iLogic patching

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.ClassifyByDescription(System.String)
member.summary: Classify part by description (same as VBScript)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.UpdateAssemblyAndPatchILogic(System.String)
member.summary: Update assembly references AND patch iLogic in SAME session CRITICAL: Don't close and re-open - that causes Inventor to re-resolve references!

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.UpdateAssemblyReferencesWithFileDescriptors(System.String)
member.summary: OLD METHOD - DEPRECATED - Use UpdateAssemblyAndPatchILogic instead

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.RenameOccurrencesToMatchFiles(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Rename all occurrences to match their new filenames CRITICAL: fd.ReplaceReference updates file path but NOT occurrence name!

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.ProcessIDWFilesWithReferenceUpdate(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Process IDW files using fd.ReplaceReference (EXACT same as VBScript ProcessIDWFilesWithReferenceUpdate)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.TryGetMappedPath(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Resolve mapped path using exact full path first, then filename fallback for normalized path mismatches.

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.InitializeLog
member.summary: Initialize logging

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.LogMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Log a message with timestamp

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.CloseLog
member.summary: Close the log file

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.SaveiLogicPatchLog(System.String)
member.summary: Save the iLogic patch log to a file

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyCloner.UpdateIPropertiesForCopiedDocuments
member.summary: Update iProperties for all copied documents (parts and assemblies)

member.name: T:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher
member.summary: Handles all iLogic-related operations

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.#ctor(Inventor.Application)
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.InitializeiLogic
member.summary: Initialize connection to iLogic Add-In

member.name: P:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.IsAvailable
member.summary: Check if iLogic is available

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.ScanAndDisplayRules(Inventor.Document)
member.summary: Scan a document and display all iLogic rules with source code

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.ExportRulesToFiles(Inventor.Document,System.Object)
member.summary: Export all rules from a document to text files

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.GetRulesAsDictionary(Inventor.Document)
member.summary: Get all rules from a document as a dictionary (name -> text)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.PatchRules(Inventor.Document,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Patch all rules in a document - replace old part names with new ones
member.param: Dictionary of old name -> new name

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.PatchRulesRecursive(Inventor.Document,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Patch rules in a document and all its referenced documents (recursive)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.PatchOccurrenceRecursive(Inventor.ComponentOccurrence,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Recursively patch rules in component occurrences

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.BuildReplacementsDictionary(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Build replacements dictionary from occurrence rename mapping

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.RemoveInstanceNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Remove instance number from occurrence name (e.g., "Part:1" -> "Part")

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.iLogicPatcher.CleanFileName(System.String)
member.summary: Clean a string for use as filename

member.name: T:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer
member.summary: Part Renamer - Dynamic heritage-based renaming solution Port of Assembly_Renamer.vbs with EXACT same logic

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.#ctor(Inventor.Application)
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.RenameAssemblyParts
member.summary: Main entry point - rename parts in active assembly

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.DetectOpenAssembly
member.summary: Detect the open assembly (same as VBScript DetectOpenAssembly)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.FlattenAndGroupComponents(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Flatten and group components (same as VBScript FlattenAndGroupComponents)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.ProcessAssemblyRecursively(Inventor.AssemblyDocument,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Boolean},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Recursively process assembly (same as VBScript ProcessAssemblyRecursively)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.GetDescriptionFromIProperty(Inventor.Document)
member.summary: Get description from iProperty (same as VBScript GetDescriptionFromIProperty)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.ClassifyByDescription(System.String)
member.summary: Classify by description (EXACT same logic as VBScript ClassifyByDescription)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.GetPlantSectionNaming
member.summary: Get plant section naming from user (same as VBScript GetPlantSectionNaming)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.ShowGroupsSummary
member.summary: Show groups summary (same as VBScript ShowGroupsSummary)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.GetUserNamingSchemes
member.summary: Get user naming schemes (same as VBScript GetUserNamingSchemes)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.CreateDynamicHeritageBasedCopies(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Create dynamic heritage-based copies (same as VBScript CreateDynamicHeritageBasedCopies)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.GenerateNewFileName(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generate new filename (same as VBScript GenerateNewFileName)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.UpdateDynamicAssemblyReferences(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Update assembly references (same as VBScript UpdateDynamicAssemblyReferences)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.UpdateAssemblyReferencesRecursively(Inventor.AssemblyDocument,System.String)
member.summary: Recursively update assembly references (same as VBScript)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.UpdateAllIDWsInDirectory(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Update all IDWs in directory (same as VBScript UpdateAllIDWsInDirectory)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.UpdateSingleIDWWithDynamicReferences(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update single IDW (same as VBScript UpdateSingleIDWWithDynamicReferences)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.RenameMainAssemblyWithPrefix(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Rename the main assembly with the selected project prefix and track mapping for IDW updates.

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.SaveMappingFile(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Save mapping file (same as VBScript SaveMappingFile)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.ScanRegistryForCounters(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Scan registry for counters (same as VBScript ScanRegistryForCounters)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.SaveCounterToRegistry(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Save counter to registry (same as VBScript SaveCounterToRegistry)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.ExtractPrefixFromScheme(System.String)
member.summary: Extract prefix from scheme (same as VBScript ExtractPrefixFromScheme)

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.InitializeLog
member.summary: Initialize logging

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.LogMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Log a message

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyClonerAddIn.PartRenamer.CloseLog
member.summary: Close log

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyBOMPrecision.Execute(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Main entry point - shows dialog and processes assembly

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyBOMPrecision.ScanForPlateParts(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Scans assembly for unique plate parts using BOM view

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyBOMPrecision.GetDiagnosticInfo(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Gets diagnostic information about what was found in the assembly

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyBOMPrecision.IsPlatePart(Inventor.PartDocument)
member.summary: Determines if a part is a plate based on part number or description

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyBOMPrecision.UpdatePartPrecisionReliableByPath(System.String)
member.summary: RELIABLE METHOD: Uses Document Settings UI to toggle precision This is the ONLY method that reliably triggers BOM refresh

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyBOMPrecision.FinalizeAssembly(Inventor.AssemblyDocument)
member.summary: Finalizes the assembly after processing all parts

member.name: M:AssemblyClonerAddIn.AssemblyBOMPrecision.ShowResults(System.Int32)
member.summary: Shows results dialog

member.name: T:AssemblyClonerAddIn.ProgressDialog
member.summary: Simple progress dialog
